speaker: Command
message: Engine 1 here Command. Report current fire conditions in the forested area. Listening

speaker: Engine 1
message: Command here Engine 1. Active wildfire in the trees ahead of the clearing. We have one hose line operating from the fire truck. Fire is pushing through the tree line. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Engine 1 here Command. Confirm if you can assess exposures beyond the smoke. Listening

speaker: Engine 1
message: Command here Engine 1. Negative, visibility beyond the fire front is limited. I need to stay on the line, and the second firefighter is tied up protecting the hose corridor. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Rescue 2 here Command. Do you have visibility toward the clearing beyond the tree line. Listening

speaker: Rescue 2
message: Command here Rescue 2. Affirmative, visual on a house at the edge of the clearing. One person is visible in front of the house near the walkway. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Rescue 2 here Command. Confirm whether that person is clear of the smoke path. Listening

speaker: Rescue 2
message: Command here Rescue 2. Negative, the person is close to the smoke path in front of the house. Access from the walkway is still open. Listening

speaker: Command
message: Engine 1 here Command. Continue holding the fire edge. Rescue 2 will assess the person near the house. Listening
